summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 14 warning, 8 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: | STATE.json error message updated | PASS | `report.mjs:145` now emits "missing or unreadable" — previous 🟡 resolved |
| Error output channel (run_1 🟡) | STILL OPEN | Errors still routed to `_stdout`; backlog item, not regressed |
🟡 bin/lib/report.mjs:112 — JSDoc still says `"With --output md, writes REPORT.md"` and `"optional --output md"` after the flag was renamed to `--md`; update both lines to match the current interface

🟡 bin/lib/report.mjs:31 — Status label maps every non-`"completed"` state to `"Run in progress"`; a `failed` or `blocked` feature shows a factually wrong header (carried forward from run_1, unresolved)

The stale JSDoc at lines 112 and 115 still documents `--output md` — behavioral correctness is fine, but any reader of the function signature gets contradicted by the actual implementation. That goes to backlog as 🟡. No critical issues block merge.
🟡 `.team/PRODUCT.md:64` — Spec still says `` `--output md` writes REPORT.md `` but implementation uses `--md`; update spec to match the shipped interface.
🟡 `test/report.test.mjs` — No test for `failed` task status; `report.mjs:68` includes `failed` in the filter but it is entirely untested — a regression in this branch would go undetected.
🟡 `test/report.test.mjs` — `tokenUsage.byPhase` rendering path (`report.mjs:58-60`) untested; only the N/A fallback is covered — a bug in `$X.XXXX` per-phase formatting would not be caught.
🟡 Gate output truncated — `report.test.mjs` results not visible in supplied log; test pass count unverifiable from gate evidence.

**Summary:** The run_2 fix resolved the prior 🔴 (boolean `--md` replaces multi-value `--output`). Core paths are well-tested. Three warnings go to backlog: the `failed` task status branch is a silent regression risk, the per-phase cost formatting is entirely untested, and the gate log is too truncated to independently verify pass count. No blocking issues.

🟡 bin/lib/report.mjs:135 — `featureName` from CLI args passed unsanitized to `path.join()`; with `--md`, writes `REPORT.md` to an attacker-controlled path (e.g., `agt report ../../tmp --md`). Validated via Node: `join("/base/.team/features", "../../../etc")` → `/etc`. Fix: validate `featureName` matches `/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/` before constructing `featureDir`.

The previous Simplicity review (run_1) issued a 🔴 FAIL for gold-plating the `--output <value>` multi-format interface. The builder's run_2 fix replaced it with `args.includes("--md")` at `report.mjs:117`. That red finding is resolved.
🟡 `bin/lib/report.mjs:112` — Stale JSDoc says "With --output md"; update to `--md`
🟡 `test/report.test.mjs:240` — Section comment says `--output md writes REPORT.md`; update to `--md`
🟡 `test/report.test.mjs:252` — Section comment says `--output md does not print report to stdout`; update to `--md`
No 🔴 findings — **merge is not blocked**. Four stale documentation references from the interface rename go to backlog.
